title: Left Controller Drift & Sync Loss
description: Joystick shows persistent hardware drift to the left. Occasional connection dropouts during calibration tests.

comments.author: Alex Mercer
comments.text: Disassembled the casing. Joystick potentiometer shows physical wear. Spare assembly ordered.

comments.author: Aarav Sharma
comments.text: Please expedite. QA sandbox team is blocked without this VR set.

title: Flickering Display Panel
description: Screen intermittently flickers or goes black for 1-2 seconds when connected via DisplayPort at 4K resolution.

comments.author: Sarah Jenkins
comments.text: Checked with a different HDMI cable and it still flickers. Seems like a DP driver issue or panel connector.

title: Annual Calibration & Recertification
description: Standard annual lab validation checkup. Out of warranty, calibration certificate expired last week.

comments.author: External Lab Tech
comments.text: Running calibration parameters. Signals within 0.2% tolerance limits.

title: Battery Swelling Check
description: Audit check: chassis base shows a slight bulge near center-left trackpad area.

comments.author: Alex Mercer
comments.text: Battery swelling confirmed. Replaced battery module under emergency maintenance protocol. Re-glued and ran stress test.

comments.author: Shreyansh
comments.text: Received laptop back. Battery health at 100%, bulge resolved. Excellent repair work.
